topUpSteps.title: Open the HalaPark app
topUpSteps.description: Go to the Wallet tab from the home screen.

topUpSteps.title: Tap "Top Up"
topUpSteps.description: Choose an amount or enter a custom value.

topUpSteps.title: Pay securely
topUpSteps.description: Use Apple Pay, card, or your saved payment method.
